title: [codereview-3] cbor_put_tstr header_len+overrun fix: edge cases, uint32, CBOR conformance
description: Pass 3 review of coap_status.c cbor_put_tstr: edge cases for len=0,=23,=255,=65535,=65536,>4G. CBOR now conforms to RFC8949 (0x7a for 32bit). No P0-P1. Dupe cbor_put_tstr in coap_keys.c/coap_msg.c noted but out of scope per bead. codereview
